test_cases.name: happy_path_standard_whitepaper
test_cases.scenario: Convert a typical technical whitepaper about machine learning into 4 professional-engaging threads for a data scientist audience on Twitter/X.

input.whitepaper_content:
# Machine Learning in Production: Best Practices

Introduction: Machine learning models in production face unique challenges. This whitepaper explores deployment strategies, monitoring, and optimization.

Key Finding 1: 87% of ML models fail in production due to data drift. We analyzed 500 deployed models and found that models without continuous monitoring degrade by 15% accuracy within 6 months.

Key Finding 2: Feature engineering accounts for 60% of ML project time. Our case study with TechCorp showed that automated feature selection reduced this to 20%.

Key Finding 3: Model retraining frequency matters. Models retrained monthly outperform quarterly-retrained models by 12% in accuracy.

Conclusion: Production ML requires systematic monitoring, efficient feature engineering, and regular retraining cycles.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill extracts 4 key insights from whitepaper, creates 4 complete threads with hook, body tweets, CTA, and hashtags. All claims verified against whitepaper content. Tone consistent across threads. Each thread has 5-6 tweets optimized for Twitter/X 280-character limit.
phase_coverage: PHASE 1: Analyze Whitepaper and Extract Key Insights
PHASE 2: Design Thread Structure for Each Insight
PHASE 7: Review for Accuracy, Tone, and Engagement

test_cases.name: happy_path_linkedin_longer_format
test_cases.scenario: Convert a business strategy whitepaper into 3 thought leadership threads for C-suite executives on LinkedIn with longer-form content.

input.whitepaper_content:
# Digital Transformation Strategy for Enterprise

Executive Summary: Organizations that prioritize digital transformation see 23% revenue growth. This whitepaper outlines the strategic pillars.

Pillar 1: Cloud Infrastructure. Companies migrating to cloud reduce operational costs by 40% and improve scalability. Case study: GlobalCorp saved $5M annually after cloud migration.

Pillar 2: Data-Driven Decision Making. Organizations using advanced analytics make decisions 5x faster. Example: RetailChain increased sales by 18% through predictive analytics.

Pillar 3: Customer Experience Innovation. Digital-first companies have 2x higher customer retention. Case study: FinanceInc improved NPS by 35 points through digital channels.

Conclusion: Digital transformation is not optional; it is a competitive necessity.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill creates 3 threads optimized for LinkedIn (longer posts, 6-8 tweets per thread). Tone emphasizes thought leadership and strategic implications. CTAs encourage discussion and perspective-sharing. All claims verified against whitepaper.
phase_coverage: PHASE 1: Analyze Whitepaper and Extract Key Insights
PHASE 2: Design Thread Structure for Each Insight
PHASE 7: Review for Accuracy, Tone, and Engagement

test_cases.name: edge_case_minimal_whitepaper

input.whitepaper_content:
# Quick Research Brief: Remote Work Productivity

Finding 1: Remote workers are 13% more productive than office workers.

Finding 2: Communication tools reduce meeting time by 30%.

Finding 3: Work-life balance improves with flexible schedules.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill gracefully handles minimal whitepaper by creating 3 simple threads (3-4 tweets each) with clear hooks and CTAs. Tone is accessible and avoids jargon. No overstatement of findings.
phase_coverage: PHASE 1: Analyze Whitepaper and Extract Key Insights
PHASE 2: Design Thread Structure for Each Insight
PHASE 7: Review for Accuracy, Tone, and Engagement

test_cases.name: edge_case_complex_technical_whitepaper
test_cases.scenario: Convert a highly technical whitepaper with complex methodology into 5 accessible threads for a general startup audience.

input.whitepaper_content:
# Quantum Computing Applications in Cryptography

Abstract: This paper explores quantum algorithms for breaking RSA encryption and proposes post-quantum cryptographic solutions.

Section 1: Shor's Algorithm can factor large numbers exponentially faster than classical algorithms. A 2048-bit RSA key could be broken in hours instead of millennia.

Section 2: Post-quantum cryptography candidates include lattice-based, hash-based, and multivariate polynomial cryptography. NIST standardized 3 algorithms in 2022.

Section 3: Organizations should begin migration to post-quantum cryptography by 2025 to ensure long-term security.

Section 4: Hybrid approaches combining classical and post-quantum methods provide transition security.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill translates complex technical concepts into accessible language for startup founders. Threads explain quantum threat without requiring deep cryptography knowledge. Analogies and practical implications emphasized. All technical claims verified.
phase_coverage: PHASE 1: Analyze Whitepaper and Extract Key Insights
PHASE 2: Design Thread Structure for Each Insight
PHASE 7: Review for Accuracy, Tone, and Engagement

test_cases.name: error_handling_no_clear_insights
test_cases.scenario: Attempt to convert a whitepaper that is purely background material with no novel insights or actionable findings.

input.whitepaper_content:
# History of Cloud Computing

Cloud computing has evolved over the past 20 years. In the 1990s, companies used on-premise servers. In the 2000s, virtualization emerged. In the 2010s, cloud providers like AWS and Azure became popular. Today, cloud is mainstream.

Different cloud models exist: IaaS, PaaS, and SaaS. Each has different characteristics.

Cloud adoption varies by industry and company size.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects lack of novel insights and reframes task to extract 'interesting implications for practitioners' instead. Output includes adjustment note explaining reframing. Threads focus on practical implications rather than historical facts. Quality report flags the limitation.
phase_coverage: PHASE 1: Analyze Whitepaper and Extract Key Insights

test_cases.name: error_handling_whitepaper_too_technical
test_cases.scenario: Convert a highly technical whitepaper about quantum mechanics for a general business audience, requiring translation.

input.whitepaper_content:
# Quantum Entanglement and Bell's Theorem

Quantum entanglement describes a phenomenon where two particles share a quantum state. When one particle is measured, the other's state is instantaneously determined, regardless of distance. This violates local realism.

Bell's Theorem (1964) proves that no local hidden variable theory can reproduce all quantum mechanical predictions. Experimental violations of Bell inequalities confirm quantum mechanics over classical theories.

Applications: Quantum key distribution (QKD) uses entanglement for theoretically unbreakable encryption. Quantum teleportation transfers quantum states between particles.

Implications: Quantum mechanics challenges our understanding of reality and enables new technologies.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill detects technical complexity mismatch and adds translation step. Output includes both technical and simplified versions of insights. Threads use analogies and practical business implications. Quality report notes 'translation_needed' flag and explains simplifications made.
phase_coverage: PHASE 1: Analyze Whitepaper and Extract Key Insights
PHASE 2: Design Thread Structure for Each Insight

test_cases.name: quality_gate_engagement_potential_assessment
test_cases.scenario: Generate threads and verify that engagement potential scores meet minimum threshold (>66%) for all threads.

input.whitepaper_content:
# AI in Healthcare: Diagnostic Accuracy Study

Study Overview: We evaluated AI diagnostic tools across 5 medical specialties with 10,000 patient cases.

Finding 1: AI diagnostic accuracy matches radiologists in 94% of cases. In 6% of cases, AI outperforms radiologists by catching subtle patterns humans miss.

Finding 2: AI reduces diagnostic time by 40%. Average diagnosis time dropped from 15 minutes to 9 minutes per case.

Finding 3: AI-assisted diagnosis (human + AI) achieves 98% accuracy, outperforming both alone. Collaboration is key.

Finding 4: Implementation costs are high ($500K-$2M per hospital), but ROI is achieved within 18 months through efficiency gains.

Conclusion: AI is a powerful diagnostic tool when used collaboratively with human expertise.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill generates threads with strong engagement hooks (surprising statistics, contrarian takes about AI + human collaboration). Each thread scores >66% on engagement rubric (hook engagement: Yes, body engagement: Yes, CTA engagement: Yes). Quality report confirms all threads meet engagement threshold.
phase_coverage: PHASE 7: Review for Accuracy, Tone, and Engagement

test_cases.name: quality_gate_accuracy_verification
test_cases.scenario: Verify that all claims in generated threads are directly supported by whitepaper content with specific evidence.

input.whitepaper_content:
# Sustainable Supply Chain Management

Executive Summary: Companies implementing sustainable supply chain practices report 15% cost reduction and 22% improvement in brand perception.

Case Study 1: GreenManufacturing Co. reduced waste by 35% through supplier audits. This saved $2.3M annually and improved customer satisfaction scores by 12 points.

Case Study 2: LogisticsPro optimized shipping routes using AI, reducing carbon emissions by 28% and fuel costs by 18%.

Best Practice 1: Supplier diversity programs increase innovation. Companies with diverse suppliers report 20% more new product ideas.

Best Practice 2: Circular economy principles extend product lifecycles. One company increased product lifespan by 40% through design changes.

Conclusion: Sustainability is both an ethical imperative and a business advantage.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill verifies every claim against whitepaper. Quality report lists specific claims verified (e.g., '15% cost reduction verified by Executive Summary. 35% waste reduction verified by Case Study 1, page X. 28% emissions reduction verified by Case Study 2.'). No overstatements or unsupported claims. All statistics include source attribution.
phase_coverage: PHASE 7: Review for Accuracy, Tone, and Engagement

test_cases.name: quality_gate_tone_consistency
test_cases.scenario: Generate threads and verify consistent tone across all threads matching the specified tone (professional-engaging).

input.whitepaper_content:
# Future of Work: Hybrid Models

Research Question: What hybrid work models maximize productivity and employee satisfaction?

Finding 1: Employees working 3 days in-office, 2 days remote report highest satisfaction (8.2/10). Fully remote (6.5/10) and fully in-office (7.1/10) score lower.

Finding 2: Collaboration improves with in-person time. Teams meeting in-person 2-3 days weekly show 25% higher innovation metrics.

Finding 3: Flexibility matters more than location. Employees with flexible schedules report 30% higher engagement regardless of office days.

Finding 4: Manager training is critical. Managers trained in hybrid leadership see 40% better team outcomes.

Recommendation: Implement flexible hybrid models with manager training.

test_cases.expected_behavior: All threads maintain professional-engaging tone with balance of authority and approachability. Examples: 'This changes how we think about work' (thread 1) and 'Here's how to apply this insight' (thread 2) both use accessible language with credibility. Quality report confirms tone consistency with specific examples from each thread.
phase_coverage: PHASE 7: Review for Accuracy, Tone, and Engagement

test_cases.name: quality_gate_hashtag_relevance_and_saturation
test_cases.scenario: Verify that all hashtags are relevant to insight topics and have appropriate saturation (50K-500K posts, not >1M).

input.whitepaper_content:
# Cybersecurity Threats in 2024

Threat 1: Ransomware attacks increased 45% year-over-year. Average ransom demand: $500K. Recovery time: 3 weeks.

Threat 2: Supply chain attacks target third-party vendors. 60% of breaches involve third-party access.

Threat 3: AI-powered phishing is harder to detect. Phishing success rate increased from 3% to 8% with AI-generated emails.

Threat 4: Zero-day vulnerabilities are exploited within 24 hours of disclosure. Patch management is critical.

Recommendation: Implement zero-trust architecture and continuous monitoring.

test_cases.expected_behavior: Skill selects hashtags like #Cybersecurity (discoverable, 50K-500K range), #Ransomware (niche but relevant), #ZeroTrust (specific to recommendation). Avoids oversaturated hashtags like #Security (>1M posts) or #Tech (>10M posts). Quality report confirms hashtag saturation levels and relevance to each insight.
